title: bupleurum gramineum subsp. cernuum
intro: Bupleurum gramineum subsp. cernuum is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family, commonly known as the small-hare's-ear or small hare's ear. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum gramineum subsp. cernuum are attributed to its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
